title: Armor and Tools For All Ores
description: This mod adds armor and tools for every ore in Minecraft, as well as their respective crafting recipes! E.X. Redstone, Lapis, Emerald, etc.
body:
This mod adds armor and tools for every ore in minecraft, as well as their respective crafting recipes! E.X. Redstone, Lapis, Emerald, etc.

A long-needed update is here! Not only have I updated this to fabric 1.21.8, but I have gone through and reworked the entire mod to refresh all of the textures and stats! I hope you guys enjoy!

As some extra info, the crafting recipe for the stone armor requires stone, not cobblestone, so make sure you smelt it first or use silk touch. :)
